title: Winning a Heart
profile: You are corresponding with Francis Fletcher, an aristocrat who has the eye of many in the land. Francis is refined, intelligent and well-to-do, but does not suffer fools lightly.
Despite being famously fickle, you are determined to win Francis over with a perfectly-penned letter from the heart (without looking like an idiot).

rulesOfCorrespondence.description: Francis respects wealth. Aristocrats gain an extra die in their Heart skill for this letter.

consequences.text: You are visited by Francis' personal aide who tells you to stop your harassing correspondence or there will be trouble.
You receive a reply, but it is not good news. Your letter was one of the best Francis has read this month, but the feelings are not reciprocated.
Francis writes back, impressed by your letter. Very few people are able to pull off such wonderful language, and Francis wishes to meet with you this week.
A personal aide of Francis appears at your door. He says that Francis was overwhelmed by your letter and believes you to be soulmates.
